reviews.comment:
Siempre en mis viajes son una hermosa parada para aprovisionar y disfrutar del buen trato de su gente!!!

(Translated by Google)
They are always a wonderful stop on my trips to stock up and enjoy the friendly service of the people!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcUp6bG1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es útil y tiene buen servicio, además de promocionar ayuda extremadamente útil al turista, el problema es que ocasionalmente diluyen la NAFTA con agua; y cuando escasea el combustible se hacen colas de varias cuadras sobre la avenida principal, debido a su ubicación... Por lo demás exelente, un buen sitio al que asistir si se necesita ayuda.

(Translated by Google)
It's useful and has good service, plus they offer extremely helpful assistance to tourists. The problem is that they occasionally dilute the gasoline with water; and when fuel is scarce, lines stretch for several blocks down the main avenue due to its location... Otherwise, it's excellent, a good place to go if you need help.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnck9ySk13EAE

reviews.comment:
Tienen buena atencion,sanitarios limpios,un espacio verde con juegos para niños.un par de fogones coma para hacer un asadito una siestita y seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
They have good service, clean restrooms, a green space with a playground for children, and a couple of barbecue grills for a quick nap before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRX05lb0pREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Paramos siempre que vamos a la cordillera. Falta variedad de productos para consumir en el viaje

(Translated by Google)
Good service. We always stop when we go to the mountains. There's not enough variety in the products we need to consume on the trip.
